reason: The 7 known LLM-abandon shapes + deterministic backstops — the failure-class taxonomy the runner must distinguish (re-run vs fix vs gate).
Rule 10 verification: confirm any contract touched during a fix has a matching spec update before calling the task done.
Trial/decision lifecycle — verify the decision-trial binding holds (no duplicate trial from the 4ms confirm-vs-message race).
BE quality bar (fail-loud, no silent skips — Rule 9) the final per-leg verdict must satisfy.
Verify FE event handling matches the wire kinds the spec gates on; SSE-stall fallback is replay-correct by design.
FE quality bar for any surgical test/wiring fix (no dead identifiers, type-only imports, biome check).
Cross-layer (L1<->L4, FE<->BE, Agent<->Lab) reasoning for diagnosing which boundary a red leg actually broke at.
